desc: Creates a Detail callout inside the active plan view at a supplied (min, max) bounding box.
summary: Creates a Detail callout inside the active plan view at a supplied (min, max) bounding box. Pure maths delegated to GetCalloutRectangle. View-family-type lookup via ResolveDetailViewFamilyTypeId.
usecase: Frame an arbitrary region for a detail drawing or evidence capture.
precondition: Active document open; active view is a plan/section; Project contains at least one Detail ViewFamilyType; BoundingBoxXYZ supplied via resolvers is valid (min < max on X and Y).
postcondition: Exactly one new callout View added as a child of the parent view, inside a single committed Transaction, audit trail recorded.
logictree: 1) User or Bot supplies Resolver_ParentViewId (defaults to active view) + Resolver_MinX/Y/Z + Resolver_MaxX/Y/Z in feet. 2) Validate — parent view exists and supports callouts; min < max on X and Y; else WireError + abort. 3) Resolve Detail ViewFamilyType id via ResolveDetailViewFamilyTypeId.FindFirstInDocument(doc); if invalid WireError + abort. 4) Open Transaction 'Create callout (bbox)'. 5) Build rect via GetCalloutRectangle.FromBoundingBox(bb). 6) callout = ViewSection.CreateCallout(doc, parentViewId, vftId, rect.min, rect.max); commit. 7) Bot: JSON {ok, callout_view_id, parent_view_id, min, max}. User: ribbon toast 'Callout placed in {parentView.Name}.' 8) Any exception → tracker.Fail(ex); WireFault {parent_view_id, min, max}.

preprompts: Creating callout in parent view at supplied bounding box…
